scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run audit:release && npm test && npm run validate:content
scripts.test:correct-display-position: npm run test:answer-shuffle && npm run test:static-site-answer-shuffle && node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-answer-shuffle-parity
scripts.test:review-store-due-limit: node --test --test-name-pattern "review-store due limit|dueCards|focus-review-store-due-limit|dispatcher|selector|negative|NaN|Infinity|fraction" tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js tests/content-spaced-repetition-schema.test.js tests/v1-1-review-store.test.js && node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-review-store-due-limit
scripts.test:mobile-ads-consent: node --test tests/mobile-ads-consent-runtime.test.js tests/content-mobile-ads-consent-schema-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "mobile ads consent|Mobile Ads consent runtime|ATT|UMP|SDK init|focus-mobile-ads-consent" && node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-mobile-ads-consent
